上报监控数据最多的机器，数值表示每秒上报多少个数据点: Hosts reporting the most monitoring data. The value is how many data points are reported per second
告警规则运行的时候，每秒失败了多少次: How many alert rule evaluations fail per second
操作 Redis 时耗时超过 1s 就算慢: A Redis operation taking more than 1s is counted as slow
每秒 Drop 掉多少个数据点。只有配置了 Pushgw.DropSample: How many data points are dropped per second. Metrics are dropped only when Pushgw.DropSample is configured
每秒有多少数据点写失败了: How many data points fail to be written per second
队列积压太严重，达到水位线，开始拒绝请求。表示每秒拒绝多少次请求: The queue backlog is too heavy and reaches the watermark, so requests start to be rejected. Shows how many requests are rejected per second
